---
title: "Item Text"
---

## Known issues

The below are known issues affecting the match betwen item text and the IRW tables. 

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-4 .dataset-item}
::: {.callout-warning collapse='true'}
## singh_2025_identity_pba
Table has 6 items for affiliation but the codebook only has 5 items
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-4 .dataset-item}
::: {.callout-warning collapse='true'}
## paampsmartsud_saba_2023_ders
The paper described only 36-item, but the IRW table contains 37
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-4 .dataset-item}
::: {.callout-warning collapse='true'}
## namprb_siwiak_2024_ssub
IRW table doesn't match the number of items provided in the paper
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-4 .dataset-item}
::: {.callout-warning collapse='true'}
## sv-maia2_randelovic_2021_erq
Paper references a 1-7 scale, IRW table is on 1-5
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-4 .dataset-item}
::: {.callout-warning collapse='true'}
## fivpei_perrig_2023_attdiff
Paper has 28 items, IRW contains only 21
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-4 .dataset-item}
::: {.callout-warning collapse='true'}
## oxfordcovid_xue_2024_at
IRW missing the item: media_tv
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-4 .dataset-item}
::: {.callout-warning collapse='true'}
## socialstereotype_hughes_2025_judgement
IRW has 6 items for affiliation but the codebook only has 5 items
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-4 .dataset-item}
::: {.callout-warning collapse='true'}
## gilbert_meta_51
`ch_anemic` is not an item in the code book
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-4 .dataset-item}
::: {.callout-warning collapse='true'}
## gilbert_meta_42
only item text for `phq` and `pss`
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-4 .dataset-item}
::: {.callout-warning collapse='true'}
## gilbert_meta_38
survey does not contain `bought_ins`
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-4 .dataset-item}
::: {.callout-warning collapse='true'}
## gilbert_meta_35
codebook contain only 8 items, response data contains 12
:::
:::

:::
